text.title: Pre-Commit Linters MUST Run on Staged Files Only Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: audit-current-hooks
step.action: Check whether each hook receives staged files or runs whole tree.

step.name: switch-to-staged-filter
step.action: Configure lint-staged / lefthook globs / pre-commit files filter.

step.name: add-whole-tree-ci
step.action: Add scheduled nightly job that lints the whole tree.
